reason: Defines internal service header propagation, AI Gateway OpenAI-compatible model invocation contracts, and service boundary ownership for QA versus AI Gateway.
Defines stable validation_error/dependency_error classification and safe downstream error exposure.
Defines secret-safe handling for provider errors, prompts, API keys, tokens, internal URLs, and tool payloads.
Defines QA Agent Host ownership of the ReAct loop, MCP tool execution, model invocation summaries, and AI Gateway-only model access.
Defines function calling transport fields including tools, tool_choice, parallel_tool_calls, assistant.tool_calls, role=tool, and streaming tool-call deltas.
Defines the concrete /internal/v1/chat/completions request, response, header, and streaming chunk schemas.
